author: yv-was-taken
title: Score Mode Semantic Incoherence: Strictest Mode Can Produce HIGHER Scores Than Strict
notes: verified_strict_score can exceed strict_score when subjective dimensions score low. _aggregate_scores filters subjective dims for verified_strict but includes them for strict (60% weight). Correct analysis, but 'verified_strict' may be intentionally named for strictest failure counting on mechanical dims only, not a monotonic ordering guarantee.
